'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=DF846SpHHxEMKAayu4kq0.aJcy0D.tbhM2Ueigs8M_w-1772678174-1.0.1.1-1_atncFB2Kk29j8Uqa2zKbnroqpVBWWXNInoaOz7hLE"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
